articles.title: Overton, Urvil power CSK to fifth spot with third straight win
articles.description: CSK chased down their first 200-plus target since 2018 and one of their future stars announced himself with a 13-ball fifty

articles.title: Urvil Patel equals record for IPL's fastest fifty
articles.description: The CSK batter scored a 13-ball fifty against Lucknow Super Giants in Chennai, headlining their five-wicket win

articles.title: Mehidy five-for hands Bangladesh slim lead despite Awais' debut ton
articles.description: Agha and Rizwan fought back after Pakistan's middle-order collapse, before Bangladesh bagged a 27-run lead

articles.title: Gill, Sai Sudharsan, Rashid power GT to second spot with fourth straight win
articles.description: Half-centuries from Gill and Sai Sudharsan headlined GT's solid start that set up a big win

articles.title: New Zealand hit their sweet spot as T20 World Cup defence looms
articles.description: Melie Kerr leads tourists with an eye to the future as injury-hit England get back to business

articles.title: Allen's 47-ball ton powers KKR to huge win over DC
articles.description: KKR's spinners restricted DC to just 142, and Allen gunned that total down almost singlehandedly

articles.title: BCCI pulls up IPL teams and owners for misconduct, protocol breaches during the season
articles.description: The advisory said "unauthorised visitors" in hotel rooms posed risks to players getting "compromised" and limited owner interactions with players during a live match

articles.title: Babar ruled out of first Bangladesh Test due to left knee injury
articles.description: PCB did not specify whether he would be ruled out of the series altogether, stating that his condition was being monitored by the team's medical panel

articles.title: Former India Under-19 cricketer Amanpreet Singh Gill dies at 36
articles.description: Amanpreet Singh Gill played youth one-dayers and a three-day Test in 2007, touring England, Malaysia and Sri Lanka with the India Under-19 team in that period

articles.title: Ahmedabad, not Bengaluru, to host IPL 2026 final
articles.description: Dharamsala will stage Qualifier 1 while New Chandigarh will host the Eliminator and Qualifier 2

articles.title: Reports: Sri Lanka Cricket likely to appoint Kusal Mendis as white-ball captain
articles.description: Sri Lanka will tour the West Indies in June and July 2026 for a full bilateral series comprising three ODIs, three T20Is, and two Test matches.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will entertain you in Test cricket: Ravichandran Ashwin
articles.description: “He is taking every bowler down. I wouldn’t mind watching him in a Test match, and I wouldn’t mind watching him in all three formats of the game," Ashwin said.
